name: Sabzi Shorva (Cream of Curried Vegetable And
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons To 5 Tablespoons Usli Ghee (clarified butter)
3/4 cup Finely Pureed Fresh Tomatoes or 1/2 cup Canned Tomato Puree
1/2 to 3/4 cup Light Cream or Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the ghee in a 3 to 4 quart deep pot over medium-high heat. When it is very hot, add the curry powder and immediately add the onion, carrots, and celery. Saute the vegetables, stirring often to ensure they brown evenly, for 5 minutes.
2. Add 1 cup water, the tomatoes, split peas, pepper, and salt. Cover and cook over low heat until the vegetables are tender (10 minutes).
3. Add enough light cream or milk to mellow and velvetize the soup as well as thin it out.
4. Heat the soup thoroughly and serve garnished with chopped fresh coriander.
